title: Disable Ad Astra Oil Wells
description: This removes the oil wells found in the Ad Astra mod.
body:
## A very simple datapack that disables [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra/versions) oil wells from appearing in a world.

If you want to disable the meteors I also have [that](https://modrinth.com/datapack/disable-ad-astra-meteors). You can use both at the same time.\
Anyone is free to use this and modify it however they want without my consent.

### Update: The datapack didn't work with the new versions of Ad Astra for 1.20.1 and 1.20.4. The 1.1 datapack should have fixed it. Thanks to Frowley on discord for reporting this to me!
